title: Create: Horse DECIMATION
description: A joke Create Addon that lets you (half-ethically) process Horses into horse related stuff!
body:
Create: Horse DECIMATION

A joke Create Addon that lets you (half-ethically) process Horses into horse related stuff! ~~As of v1.0, this mod requires [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable)!~~ ## Main Features ### Crushable Horses (for getting started) By putting a horse entity inside of a pair of crushing wheels, it will drop Horse Dust, the main item for this mod used into majority of the mod's crafting recipe. ### Abducting Horses This mod features a functionable block that requires Create's Encased Fans and can abduct Horses to turn it into a spawnegg-like item (horse.jpg) ### Horse Glue Since this is a joke mod, it features (partially edible) horse glue to be used as an alternative to slimeball ### Automatic Censor the word "Horse" This mod features an automatically censors the word "horse" into almost any rendering text of Minecraft. This can be disabled in this mod's client config. ## "Why decimate horses exactly?" Because its [evil and intimidating](https://imgflip.com/i/9tzfpu). Or for the love of the game in particular ## Video Demonstration ## Credits Portions of this mod's code are derived from [Create](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create) by The Create Team / The Creators of Create, licensed under the MIT license.
